triples.subject: China
triples.sentence: China’s economy is stalling, the country is proving a much trickier market for Western brands, and geopolitical risk looms large.

triples.subject: Electric Vehicles
triples.sentence: with EVs accounting for 60–70% of vehicles sold.

triples.subject: China
triples.sentence: it is estimated to have around 80% of the world’s polysilicon, wafer, cell, and module manufacturing capacity.

triples.subject: Global sales of baijiu
triples.sentence: In 2023, global sales of baijiu were estimated at US$167 billion.
